text.en:
If your Army Faction is **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN**, this unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back, but when doing so:

■ It cannot target a unit it was within Engagement Range of at the start of the turn.
■ It cannot target a unit that was the target of another unit’s charge or attack this phase.
When mustering your army, unless specifically stated otherwise, you cannot select **LEGIONS OF EXCESS** as your Army Faction.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER** units from your army can ignore any or all modifiers to their Move characteristic and any or all modifiers to Advance and Charge rolls made for them.

At the start of the battle, your **WARLORD**’s unit is your army’s Favoured Champions. The first time in each player’s turn that an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER** unit from your army destroys an enemy unit, after resolving all of its attacks, that **CHARACTER** unit becomes your army’s new Favoured Champions, replacing the old one.

Each time a model in your army’s Favoured Champions unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll

When a friendly Emperor’s Children Battleline unit is selected to make an advance/fall‑back move, that unit’s attacks have +1 S until the end of the turn. This detachment has the host tag and cannot be taken with another host detachment.
text.de: Wenn eine befreundete Emperor’s-Children-Linientruppen-Einheit für das Ausführen einer Vorrücken-/Rückzugsbewegung gewählt wird, haben Attacken jener Einheit bis zum Ende des Zugs +1 S. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Heerschar und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Heerschar gewählt werden.
text.es: Cuando una unidad Línea de batalla Hijos del Emperador amiga se elija para hacer un movimiento de avanzar/de retroceder, los ataques de esa unidad tienen +1 a F hasta el final del turno.
text.fr: Quand une unité de Ligne d’Emperor’s Children amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance/de retraite, ses attaques ont +1 en F jusqu'à la fin du tour.
text.it: Quando un’unità Linea di Battaglia degli Emperor’s Children amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata/ripiegamento, i suoi attacchi hanno +1 Fo fino alla fine del turno. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Schiera e non può essere preso con altri distaccamenti Schiera.
text.ja: 味方エンペラーズ・チルドレン・バトルライン・ユニットが全力移動/退却移動を宣言した時、そのターン終了時まで、そのユニットの攻撃は【攻】に+1の修正を受ける。
text.ko: 아군 엠퍼러즈 칠드런 전열 유닛이 급속/후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 턴이 종료될 때까지 그 유닛의 공격에 위력 +1을 적용합니다.
text.zh: 在一个己方帝皇之子战线单位被选择进行突进/后撤移动时，在该回合结束前那个单位的攻击拥有 +1 S。

name.ja: 勝利こそがふさわしき者

text.es: La unidades Filos Impecables amigas tienen Combatir primero.
text.fr: Les unités de Lames Infaillibles amies ont Combat en Premier.
text.it: Le unità di Lame Impeccabili amiche hanno Combatte per Prima.
text.ja: 味方フロウレス・ブレイド・ユニットは『先手』を持つ。
text.zh: 己方无瑕剑魔单位拥有先攻。

text.en:
■ While an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly **LEGIONS OF EXCESS** units, it is Empowered.
■ While a **LEGIONS OF EXCESS** unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** units, it is Empowered.

While a unit from your army is Empowered, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. If such a weapon already has that ability, each time an attack is made with that weapon, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
When a friendly Emperor’s Children Terminator unit is set up, that unit has +1 to charge rolls until the end of the turn.
text.de: Wenn eine befreundete Emperor’s-Children-Terminator-Einheit platziert wird, hat sie bis zum Ende des Zugs +1 auf Angriffswürfe.
text.es: Cuando una unidad Exterminador Hijos del Emperador amiga se despliega, tiene +1 a las tiradas de carga hasta el final del turno.
text.fr: Quand une unité de Terminators Emperor’s Children amie est placée, elle a +1 aux jets de charge jusqu'à la fin du tour.
text.it: Quando un’unità Terminator degli Emperor’s Children amica viene schierata, ha +1 ai tiri per caricare fino alla fine del turno.
text.ja: 味方エンペラーズ・チルドレン・ターミネイター・ユニットが配置を行った時、そのターン終了時まで、そのユニットの突撃ロールは+1の修正を受ける。
text.ko: 아군 엠퍼러즈 칠드런 터미네이터 유닛이 전장에 놓일 때, 그 유닛에 턴이 종료될 때까지 돌격 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
text.zh: 当一个己方帝皇之子终结者单位被部署时，在该回合结束前，那个单位进行的冲锋掷骰结果 +1。

text.en:
Each time an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army is selected to fight, if it made a Charge move this turn, select one of the abilities below. While resolving those attacks, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability:

■ **[LETHAL HITS]**
■ **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]**

Each time an **EMPEROR'S CHILDREN** model from your army makes an attack, if it is a **TRANSPORT** model or disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
You can re-roll Advance rolls made for **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** units from your army.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** units from your army have the following ability:

**Sensational Performance:** Each time this unit is selected to fight, if this unit made a Charge move this turn, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase:

■ This unit cannot target a unit it was within Engagement Range of at the start of the turn.
■ This unit cannot target a unit that was the target of another unit’s attack this phase.
■ Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of this unit’s melee weapons by 1.
Once per battle round, when you target a **FULGRIM** unit from your army with the Sinuous Breach or Prideful Superiority Stratagem, you can reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

At the start of the battle round, if your **WARLORD** is on the battlefield, you must pledge a number to Slaanesh representing how many enemy units will be destroyed this battle round. At the end of the battle round, if the number of enemy units destroyed this battle round is greater than or equal to your pledge, you gain a number of Pact points equal to your pledge. Otherwise, you do not gain any Pact points this battle round and your **WARLORD** model suffers D3 mortal wounds.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** units from your army gain a bonus depending on how many Pact points you have gained during the battle, as shown below (these are all cumulative).

target.en: One or more **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER** units from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in those **CHARACTER** units have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability while targeting that enemy unit.

fluff.en: By slaying their foes in close combat, the champions of Slaanesh seek to elevate themselves in his favour.

target.en: Your army’s Favoured Champions unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER** unit becomes your army’s Favoured Champions, or just after your army’s Favoured Champions unit destroys an enemy unit.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER** unit from your army that is not your army’s Favoured Champions makes an attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: Rivalries are commonplace amongst the champions of the Emperor’s Children as all vie for Slaanesh’s boons.

target.en: That **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER** unit.

when.en: Your Charge phase, when a friendly **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER** unit within 12” of an **engaged** enemy unit **declares a charge**.

effect.en:
Your unit can re-roll **charge rolls**.
Your unit must end that **charge move engaged** with one or more of those enemy units.

fluff.en: Rivals for the Dark Prince’s favour will stop at nothing to outdo their foes and claim a greater tally of souls.

target.en: That **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.

effect.en: Select one friendly **LEGIONS OF EXCESS** unit within 6" of your unit. One model in that **LEGIONS OF EXCESS** unit recovers up to 3 lost wounds or, if it is a **DAEMONETTES** unit, return up to D3+3 destroyed models to it instead.

fluff.en: Slaaneshi daemons feed upon the emotions of others, with agony a particular delicacy.

target.en: One **LEGIONS OF EXCESS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back, provided at least one of the targets of that charge is within Engagement Range of one or more **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** units from your army.

fluff.en: The daemons of Slaanesh care naught for mortals but strive to earn the approval of their Dark Prince.

target.en: One **SLAANESH** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Those who have earned the favour of their Dark Prince may be granted a sliver of his grace.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn and has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

fluff.en: Fulgrim’s scions are renowned for their bladecraft, toying with their inferiors while preparing an exquisite, penetrating thrust.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Bedazzled by these warriors’ weaving swordsmanship and hypnotic aura foes cannot land a telling blow upon them.

target.en: That **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just before an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army Consolidates.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3", provided your unit ends that Consolidation move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: Caught up in the joyful exhilaration of violent excess, the momentum of the Emperor’s Children is almost impossible to halt.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

fluff.en: The visceral thrill of killing causes the warriors of the Emperor’s Children to enter an ecstatic frenzy of butchery and dismemberment.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: Warriors who venerate Slaanesh through the most graceful fighting forms are rewarded for their efforts.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Their superhuman reflexes enhanced by endless streams of addictive combat stimms, the Emperor’s Children react to incoming fire with haste, weaving between shots and taking cover in the blink of an eye.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: With cocktails of resilience-enhancing stimms or armour inlaid with forbidden runes of warding, the Emperor’s Children sneeringly disregard even powerful blows.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model in your unit makes an attack that targets an eligible unit within 12", improve the Strength and  Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: At short range, the Emperor’s Children eagerly target weak points in their enemies, exulting over every cry of pain they elicit.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN DAEMON** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, you can re-roll Charge rolls for friendly **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** units within 6" of your unit.

fluff.en: Those with the Dark Prince’s blessings inspire euphoric floods of battle-lust in the Emperor’s Children, who power towards the foe with screams of murderous ecstasy.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: The Emperor’s Children find stimulation in excess, be it brutally shocking acts of violence or gratuitous displays of martial prowess.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Hideously euphoric concoctions empower the minds and constitutions of the Legion’s sybaritic warriors.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a **CHARACTER** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: The chance to ostentatiously humble the foe’s champions and prove them worthless rivals is a lure few Emperor’s Children can resist.

target.en: That **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER** unit becomes your army’s Favoured Champions.

effect.en: Each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

fluff.en: Those who gaze upon one of Slaanesh’s chosen are stricken by their diabolic majesty.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through enemy models (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed

fluff.en: Relying upon shock, awe and daemonically enhanced vehicles, the Emperor’s Children drive through the enemy lines to outflank the enemy.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristic; the Hit roll; the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Inured to ordinary sensations by several lifetimes of indulgence, there is little that can deter or faze the warriors of the Emperor’s Children.

target.en: That **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.

effect.en: Increase your pledge to Slaanesh by 1.

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

fluff.en: The hubris of the Emperor’s Children is both their greatest strength and their biggest weakness.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit is your army’s Favoured Champions. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: The more extravagant and luridly violent the kill, the greater the Dark Prince’s appreciation.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Your unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6". If your unit is not your army's Favoured Champions, you can re-roll the dice to determine the distance of that **surge move**.

fluff.en: Consumed by their obsessive desire for revenge, the Emperor’s Children surge into oncoming fusillades.

target.en: That **LEGIONS OF EXCESS** unit and one friendly **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit within 6" of it that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Fight phase, just after a **LEGIONS OF EXCESS** unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.

effect.en: Your **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit can declare a charge. If it does so and it has already been selected to fight this phase, it cannot fight again this phase.

fluff.en: As the violence intensifies, so does the ecstasy of battle empower daemon and mortal alike.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that made a Charge move in the previous turn and destroyed one or more enemy units in the previous Fight phase.

when.en: Your opponent’s Command phase.

effect.en: Each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if they are Below Half-strength. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

fluff.en: Flensing strikes, dismemberments and eviscerations strike fear into the hearts of the foe.

target.en: One **EMPEROR'S CHILDREN** unit from your army that destroyed an enemy unit this phase, and one friendly **TRANSPORT** it is able to embark within.

when.en: End of the Fight phase.

effect.en: If your **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit is wholly within 6" of that **TRANSPORT**, it can embark within it.

fluff.en: The fleeting obsessions of the Emperor’s Children cause them always to seek fresh targets.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN TRANSPORT** from your army that has one or more **TORMENTORS** units embarked within it (excluding Battle-shocked units).

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Select one objective marker you control that your **TRANSPORT** is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: The Emperor’s Children send forth their front-line troops in swift vehicles to seize ground rapidly.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** that made a Normal move this turn.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit is eligible to declare a charge.

fluff.en: Cocktails of combat stimms and a blazing murderlust drive the warriors of the Emperor’s Children forward at breakneck speed.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN TRANSPORT** from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit embarked within your **TRANSPORT** can disembark. When doing so, models in that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of that **TRANSPORT** and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: As their transports come under fire, the Emperor’s Children disembark and take the fight to the foe with boltgun and sword.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN TRANSPORT** from your army, or up to two **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN DEDICATED TRANSPORTS** from your army.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: For each of those **TRANSPORTS** wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: The Emperor’s Children utilise their infantry to pin the enemy down whilst further transports seek to outflank the foe and deploy troops behind.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army (excluding **BEASTS** and **VEHICLES**) that is within 8" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: The Emperor’s Children possess inhuman vigour - their warriors move with monstrous speed to counter any advance and meet any challenge.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within 3" horizontally of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: The Emperor’s Children delight in the shattering of false hope, often disengaging from their foes only to strike again at an exposed flank.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN DAEMON** unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

fluff.en: The power of Slaanesh is an undulating and writhing thing, and his daemonic servants can mould their forms to slither over and through any obstacle.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6".

fluff.en: Invigorated by pain, the Emperor’s Children will embrace an enemy’s attack as a catalyst for masterful vengeance.

target.en: That **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit.

when.en: Any phase, just after a mortal wound or attack is allocated to a model in an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

fluff.en: On occasion, the Dark Prince may grant a boon of protection to his favoured followers in the heat of battle. Such a boon incurs a debt, one that will be paid in the fullness of time.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects targets, it must select your unit as the target of its attacks.

fluff.en: The Emperor’s Children revel in every sensation - even ones that would slay lesser mortals outright.

target.en: One **SLAANESH BEASTS, SLAANESH INFANTRY** or **SLAANESH MOUNTED** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". When doing so, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

fluff.en: In the final act of the battle, the followers of Slaanesh descend to slaughter the remaining foes.

target.en: One **DAEMONETTES** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. If it arrives back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units (instead of more than 9"). provided it is also set up wholly within 9" of one or more friendly **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** units.

fluff.en: The daemons of Slaanesh are not bound by the laws of reality, fading in and out of existence at will.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army (you can only select a **VEHICLE** if it is a **WALKER)** that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.

effect.en: Your unit can declare a charge. When doing so, you must select that enemy unit as a target of that charge, and your unit does not receive a Charge bonus this turn.

fluff.en: Contempt for lesser warriors drives the Emperor’s Children in their punishing reprisals.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Death is but another thrilling experience and the Emperor’s Children are loath to deny the enemy such ecstatic sensation.

target.en: One **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The abhorrent contempt that the Emperor’s Children possess, combined with their combat-stimmed physiologies, makes them unyielding foes to face.

target.en: One friendly <k>Emperor’s Children Battleline</k> unit.
target.es: 1 unidad <k>Línea de batalla Hijos del Emperador</k> amiga.
target.fr: Une unité de <k>Ligne</k> d’<k>Emperor’s Children</k> amie.
target.it: Un’unità <k>Linea di Battaglia</k> degli <k>Emperor’s Children</k> amica.
target.ja: 味方<k>エンペラーズ・チルドレン・バトルライン</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>帝皇之子战线</k>单位。

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.
when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.
effect.de: Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12". Jene feindliche Einheit hat +6" Entdeckungsreichweite.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga visible para tu unidad y a 12" o menos de ella. Esa unidad enemiga tiene +6" al alcance de detección.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins de votre unité. L’unité ennemie choisie a +6" en portée de détection.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica visibile entro 12" dalla tua unità. Quell’unità nemica ha +6" alla distanza di individuazione.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 아군 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어오는 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于该单位 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位的侦测范围增加 6"。

fluff.en: Hurling vile semiorganic screamer grenades into the midst of the foe, these warriors mark their presence not only by the wails of their ordnance, but also by the agonised screams of their victims.
fluff.de: Diese Krieger schleudern scheußliche semiorganische Kreischergranaten in den Feind, um dessen Gegenwart nicht nur durch das Geheul der Sprengsätze zu offenbaren, sondern auch durch das leidvolle Schreien ihrer Opfer.
fluff.es: Lanzando viles granadas aulladoras semiorgánicas al enemigo, estos guerreros marcan su presencia no solo por el aullido de su artillería, sino también por los gritos agonizantes de sus víctimas.
fluff.fr: En jetant sur l’ennemi des grenades hurleuses semi-organiques, ces guerriers signalent leur présence non seulement par la plainte de leurs tirs, mais également par les cris de douleur de leurs victimes.
fluff.it: Lanciando disgustose granate urlanti semiorganiche tra i ranghi nemici, questi guerrieri annunciano la propria presenza non solo con gli strilli delle armi, ma anche con quelli delle vittime agonizzanti.
fluff.ja: この戦士たちは敵の只中に有機物と混ぜて作られた禍々しき絶叫手榴弾を投げ込む。彼らは兵器そのものが発する悲鳴のみならず、犠牲者に苦悶の叫び声を上げさせることで、自らの存在を誇示するのだ。
fluff.ko: 악랄한 유기 혼합형 비명 수류탄을 적진 한가운데에 던지면서 등장을 알리는 이 전사들은 짊어진 화기의 소음뿐만 아니라 희생양의 처절한 비명까지 더해 제 존재감을 드러낸다.
fluff.zh: 这些战士将恶毒的半有机尖啸手雷投向敌阵深处，他们不仅以弹药的凄厉啸叫宣示着自身的存在，更以受害者那痛苦绝望的惨嚎作为自己的印记。

target.en: That <k>Emperor’s Children Battleline</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>Línea de batalla Hijos del Emperador</k>.
target.ja: その<k>エンペラーズ・チルドレン・バトルライン</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>帝皇之子战线</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Emperor’s Children Battleline unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Emperor’s-Children-Linientruppen-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Línea de batalla Hijos del Emperador amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Ligne d’Emperor’s Children amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Linea di Battaglia degli Emperor’s Children amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方エンペラーズ・チルドレン・バトルライン・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 엠퍼러즈 칠드런 전열 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方帝皇之子战线单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.
effect.de: Jene Fernkampfattacken verhindern nicht, dass deine Einheit versteckt ist.
effect.es: Esos ataques a distancia no impiden que tu unidad esté oculta.
effect.fr: Ces attaques de tir n’empêchent pas votre unité d’être cachée.
effect.it: Quegli attacchi da tiro non impediscono alla tua unità di essere nascosta.
effect.ja: それらの射撃攻撃は、その自軍ユニットの隠密状態を解除しない。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 그 원거리 공격에도 불구하고 은폐 상태를 유지합니다.
effect.zh: 这些远程攻击不会使您的单位无法被隐藏。

fluff.en: Far from hiding from the foe, these warriors unleash such an unbearable barrage of blinding light and deafening sound that those who try to take aim at them are temporarily deafened and blinded.
fluff.de: Diese Krieger verstecken sich keineswegs vor dem Feind; im Gegenteil entfesseln sie eine solch unerträgliche Salve aus blendendem Licht und ohrenbetäubendem Krach, dass jene, die auf sie zielen, für einen Augenblick nahezu taub und blind werden.
fluff.es: Lejos de esconderse del enemigo, estos guerreros desatan luz tan insoportable y cegadora y un sonido tan ensordecedor que quienes intentan atacarlos quedan temporalmente sordos y ciegos.
fluff.fr: Loin de se cacher de l’ennemi, ces guerriers lâchent un tel barrage de lumière aveuglante et de sons assourdissants que ceux qui tentent de les viser sont temporairement privés de leurs sens.
fluff.it: Determinati a farsi notare dai nemici, questi guerrieri scatenano un bombardamento di luce accecante e suoni assordanti così intenso che cercare di prenderli di mira risulta temporaneamente impossibile.
fluff.ja: この戦士たちは敵に堂々と姿を晒し、目をくらませ耳を裂くような爆音を解き放つ。彼らに武器を向けていた敵は、一時的に耳目を潰されてしまうのだ。
fluff.ko: 적으로부터 몸을 숨기기는커녕, 이 전사들은 결코 견뎌낼 수 없는 눈 부신 빛과 귀를 멀게 하는 소음을 무수히 발산해 자신들을 조준하는 적들의 시각과 청각을 일시적으로 앗아간다.
fluff.zh: 这些位于远处的战士并没有隐藏自己，他们所释放出的耀眼光芒和喧闹噪音能让那些尝试攻击他们的敌人暂时失聪失明。

target.en: That <k>Emperor’s Children Battleline</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>Línea de batalla Hijos del Emperador</k>.
target.ja: その<k>エンペラーズ・チルドレン・バトルライン</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>帝皇之子战线</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Emperor’s Children Battleline unit within range of an objective.
when.de: In der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete Emperor’s-Children-Linientruppen-Einheit in Reichweite eines Missionsziels als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad Línea de batalla Hijos del Emperador amiga que esté dentro del alcance de algún objetivo.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de Ligne d’Emperor’s Children amie à portée d’un objectif.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità Linea di Battaglia degli Emperor’s Children amica entro la gittata di un obiettivo.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、作戦目標の確保範囲内にいる味方エンペラーズ・チルドレン・バトルライン・ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 목표물의 범위 내에 있는 아군 엠퍼러즈 칠드런 전열 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 对手的射击阶段或近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个位于目标范围内的己方帝皇之子战线单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Attacks that target your unit have -1 AP until that enemy unit has attacked.
effect.de: Attacken gegen deine Einheit haben -1 DS, bis jene feindliche Einheit attackiert hat.
effect.es: Los ataques que tomen como blanco tu unidad tienen -1 FP hasta que esa unidad enemiga haya atacado.
effect.fr: Les attaques qui ciblent votre unité ont -1 en PA jusqu’à ce que cette unité ennemie ait attaqué.
effect.it: Gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità hanno -1 VP finché quell’unità nemica non ha attaccato.
effect.ja: その敵ユニットの攻撃が終わるまでの間、その自軍ユニットを対象とする攻撃は【貫】に-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 그 적 유닛이 공격 수행을 종료할 때까지 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 공격에 관통 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 直到那个敌方单位完成攻击前，针对您的单位进行的攻击的 AP -1。

fluff.en: Having seized some vital location or enthralling prize, these Slaaneshi warriors experience a frenzied need to claim it that renders them inured to the most grievous hurts.
fluff.de: Nachdem diese Slaanesh verfallenen Krieger eine Schlüsselposition oder einen verlockenden Schatz erobert haben, werden sie von der wahnhaften Vorstellung besessen, dass ihnen jemand etwas wegnehmen könnte, die sie so vereinnahmt, dass sie selbst schlimmste Verletzungen nicht spüren.
fluff.es: Tras apoderarse de un lugar vital o de un botín cautivador, estos guerreros de Slaanesh sienten una necesidad frenética de reclamarlo que los vuelve inmunes a las heridas más graves.
fluff.fr: Après s’être emparés d’un lieu crucial ou d’un trésor fascinant, ces guerriers slaaneshis ressentent un besoin si frénétique de le conserver qu’ils deviennent insensibles aux plus graves des blessures.
fluff.it: Quando avvistano una postazione chiave o un prezioso tesoro, questi guerrieri slaaneshi avvertono un bisogno di conquistarlo così irresistibile che non sentono il dolore.
fluff.ja: このスラーネッシュの戦士たちは要衝を制圧し、魅力的な戦利品を手にした時、彼らはそれを手中に収め続けなければという狂乱の欲望に衝き動かされる。その衝動は、いかなる負傷も凌ぐ糧となる。
fluff.ko: 요충지나 매혹적인 전리품을 손에 넣는 순간, 이 슬라네쉬 전사들은 그것을 독점하려는 강렬한 열망에 사로잡혀 가장 참혹한 상처조차 덤덤히 견뎌낸다.
fluff.zh: 在夺取了重要的地点或迷人的战利品后，这些色孽信徒陷入了一种掌控欲望的狂热，使他们几乎感觉不到疼痛。

name.es: El honor es para los necios
name.ja: 名誉など狗に食わせよ

target.en: That <k>Flawless Blades</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>フロウレス・ブレイド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Flawless Blades unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete <k>Erlesene</k>-<k>Klingen</k>-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Filos Impecables amiga se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Lames Infaillibles amie est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità di Lame Impeccabili amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方<k>フロウレス・ブレイド</k>・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 무결의 검객 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方无瑕剑魔单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have <k>[Precision]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen <k>[Precisión]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont <k>[Précision]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno <k>[Precisione]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃は<k>［精密攻撃］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的近战攻击拥有<k>[精准]</k>技能。

fluff.en: Far from facing enemy champions in fair duels one‑on‑one, the Flawless Blades fall upon them like a pack of jackals competing viciously to claim the glory of the kill.
fluff.de: Erlesene Klingen stellen feindliche Champions keineswegs in fairen Duellen; stattdessen fallen sie wie ein Rudel Hyänen über sie her und wetteifern um den Todesstoß.
fluff.es: Lejos de enfrentarse a campeones enemigos en duelos justos uno contra uno, los Filos Impecables caen sobre ellos como una manada de chacales compitiendo ferozmente por la gloria de la muerte.
fluff.fr: Loin d’affronter les champions ennemis en combat singulier, les Lames Infaillibles s’abattent sur eux telle une meute de chacals rivalisant pour s’arroger le mérite de les avoir occis.
fluff.it: Invece di affrontare i campioni nemici in duello, le Lame Impeccabili si avventano sugli avversari come un branco di sciacalli in competizione tra loro.
fluff.ja: フロウレス・ブレイドは敵の勇士との公平な決闘など行わぬ。彼らはジャッカルの群れのように襲い掛かり、殺戮の栄光を勝ち取るべく苛烈に争うのだ。
fluff.ko: 적의 용장과 정정당당히 일기토를 청하기는커녕, 무결의 검객은 이리처럼 서로 경쟁적으로 달려들어 살육의 영광을 차지하려 한다.
fluff.zh: 无瑕剑魔并不会与敌军的武将进行公平的对决，他们如同豺狼一般相互争夺斩首的荣誉。

target.en: That <k>Flawless Blades</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>フロウレス・ブレイド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit that was engaged with a friendly Flawless Blades unit ends a fall‑back move, if that Flawless Blades unit is unengaged.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit, die sich im Nahkampf mit einer befreundeten Erlesene-Klingen-Einheit befand, eine Rückzugsbewegung beendet und jene Erlesene-Klingen-Einheit nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga que estaba trabada con alguna unidad Filos Impecables amiga termina un movimiento de retroceder, si esa unidad Filos Impecables no está trabada.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie qui était engagée avec une unité de Lames Infaillibles amie finit un mouvement de retraite, si l’unité de Lames Infaillibles est non engagée.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica che era ingaggiata con un’unità di Lame Impeccabili amica termina un movimento di ripiegamento, se quell’unità di Lame Impeccabili è non ingaggiata.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、味方フロウレス・ブレイド・ユニットと接敵状態であった敵ユニットが退却移動を終了させた時、そのフロウレス・ブレイド・ユニットが非接敵状態である場合。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 아군 무결의 검객과 교전 상태였던 적 유닛이 후퇴 이동을 종료할 때, 그 무결의 검객 유닛이 교전 상태가 아닌 경우.
when.zh: 您对手的移动阶段中，在原本与一个己方无瑕剑魔单位处于交战状态的一个敌方单位结束一次后撤移动时，并且那个无瑕剑魔单位不处于交战状态。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: Seeing their foes fleeing in terror before them only fires the chem‑laced blood of the Flawless Blades, urging them on toward their next challenge all the quicker.
fluff.de: Ihre Feinde panisch flüchten zu sehen, bringt das von Chemikalien verunreinigte Blut der Erlesenen Klingen erst recht in Wallung und lässt sie umso schneller neuen Herausforderungen entgegeneilen.
fluff.es: Ver a sus enemigos huir aterrorizados ante ellos enciende aún más la sangre impregnada de químicos de los Filos Impecables, impulsándolos hacia su próximo desafío aún más rápido.
fluff.fr: Voir leurs ennemis fuir de terreur devant eux ne fait qu’attiser le feu dans les veines saturées de substances des Lames Infaillibles, les poussant à se précipiter vers leur prochain défi.
fluff.it: Vedere i nemici fuggire in preda al terrore fa ribollire il sangue saturo di elementi chimici delle Lame Impeccabili, che si dirigono inesorabilmente verso il bersaglio successivo.
fluff.ja: 眼前の敵が恐怖で逃げ惑うのを見た時、化学物質で侵されたフロウレス・ブレイドの血は燃え上がり、更なる挑戦へと彼らを全力で駆り立てる。
fluff.ko: 겁에 질려 내빼는 적을 지켜보노라면 무결의 검객은 제 몸속에 흐르는 약물로 찌든 피가 끓어올라, 한시라도 빨리 새로운 적수를 찾아 나서고자 한다.
fluff.zh: 看见落荒而逃的惊恐敌人只会进一步刺激无瑕剑魔，使他们更快地前去寻找下一个挑战。

target.en: That <k>Flawless Blades</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>フロウレス・ブレイド</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Charge phase, when a friendly Flawless Blades unit starts a charge move.
when.de: Deine Angriffsphase, wenn eine befreundete Erlesene-Klingen-Einheit eine Angriffsbewegung beginnt
when.es: En tu fase de carga, cuando una unidad Filos Impecables amiga inicia un movimiento de carga.
when.fr: À votre phase de Charge, quand une unité de Lames Infaillibles amie commence un mouvement de charge.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Carica, quando un’unità di Lame Impeccabili amica inizia unmovimento di carica.
when.ja: 自軍の突撃フェイズ中、味方フロウレス・ブレイド・ユニットが突撃移動を開始した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 돌격 페이즈, 아군 무결의 검객 유닛이 돌격 이동을 시작할 때.
when.zh: 在您的冲锋阶段中，当一个己方无瑕剑魔单位开始一次冲锋移动时。

effect.en: Your unit can move through models (excluding <k>MONSTER/VEHICLE</k> models).
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann sich durch Modelle bewegen (ausgenommen <k>Monster</k>-<k>/Fahrzeug</k>-Modelle).
effect.es: Tu unidad puede mover a través de miniaturas (salvo <k>MONSTRUO/VEHÍCULO</k>).
effect.fr: Votre unité peut se déplacer à travers les figurines (figurines de <k>Monstre/Véhicule</k> exclues).
effect.it: La tua unità può attraversare i modelli (esclusi i modelli <k>MOSTRO/VEICOLO</k>).
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは兵（<k><モンスター/ビークル/k>・兵を除く）を通り抜けて移動できる。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 모델(<k>괴수/기체</k> 모델 제외)을 통과해서 이동할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以移动穿过模型（<k>凶兽/载具</k>模型除外）。

fluff.en: Scornfully dismissing the chaff that blocks their path, the Flawless Blades swat them aside and sweep regally on toward their true quarry.
fluff.de: Die Erlesenen Klingen ignorieren voller Verachtung das Vieh in ihrem Weg und schlagen es beiseite, um voller Erhabenheit auf ihre wahre Beute zuzuschreiten.
fluff.es: Despreciando con desdén a quien bloquee su camino, los Filos Impecables avanzan majestuosamente hacia su verdadera presa.
fluff.fr: Ignorant avec dédain les piètres combattants sur leur passage, les Lames Infaillibles les écartent et s’avancent, hautaines, vers leur proie véritable.
fluff.it: Sbarazzandosi in fretta della feccia che hanno davanti, le Lame Impeccabili si fanno largo con eleganza verso il loro vero obiettivo.
fluff.ja: フロウレス・ブレイドは、行く手を阻む雑兵たちを侮蔑の眼差しと共に薙ぎ払い、一蹴する。そして堂々と、真の獲物へと進んでいくのだ。
fluff.ko: 길을 막는 송사리들을 경멸 가득 제쳐버리는 무결의 검객은 자신이 점찍은 진정한 사냥감을 향해 당당한 기세로 달려든다.
fluff.zh: 无瑕剑魔轻蔑地忽视了阻挡在面前的炮灰，将他们推开或者优雅地闪躲，然后向真正的目标靠近。

target.en: That <k>Emperor’s Children Terminator</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>エンペラーズ・チルドレン・ターミネイター</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>帝皇之子终结者</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Emperor’s Children Terminator</k> unit.
when.de: In der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Emperor’s</k>-<k>Children</k>-<k>Terminator</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad <k>Exterminador Hijos del Emperador</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Terminators Emperor’s Children</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità <k>Terminator</k> degli <k>Emperor’s Children</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>エンペラーズ・チルドレン・ターミネイター</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>엠퍼러즈 칠드런 터미네이터</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 您对手的射击阶段或者近战阶段中，在一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>帝皇之子终结者</k>单位选择成为攻击目标时。

effect.en: Attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.
effect.de: Attacken gegen deine Einheit mit einer S, die höher ist als der W deiner Einheit, haben -1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
effect.es: Los ataques que tomen como blanco tu unidad con una F mayor que la R de tu unidad tienen -1 a las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr: Les attaques qui ciblent votre unité avec une F supérieure à son E ont -1 aux jets de blessure.
effect.it: Gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità con una Fo maggiore della R della tua unità hanno -1 ai tiri per ferire.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを対象とした攻撃の【攻】が、その自軍ユニットの【耐】を上回っている場合、その攻撃のウーンズロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 공격의 위력이 이 유닛의 내구보다 높다면 타격 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 当对您的单位进行的攻击的 S 大于该单位的 T 时，那次攻击的致伤掷骰 -1。

fluff.en: So well shielded by their armour are Emperor’s Children Terminators that, when the foe’s attacks actually punch through to wound them, the rarity of the sensation is an invigorating tonic.
fluff.de: Die Terminatoren der Emperor’s Children sind durch ihre Rüstungen derart gut geschützt, dass es so selten geschieht, dass ihnen ein Feind tatsächlich eine Wunde beifügt, dass der Sinneseindruck eher belebend wirkt.
fluff.es: Los Exterminadores de los Hijos del Emperador están tan bien protegidos por su armadura que, cuando los ataques enemigos los hieren, la rareza de la sensación es un tónico vigorizante.
fluff.fr: Les Terminators des Emperor’s Children sont si bien protégés par leurs armures que lorsqu’une attaque ennemie parvient à la percer, la sensation est d’une rareté revigorante.
fluff.it: I Terminator degli Emperor’s Children sono talmente corazzati che, quando gli attacchi del nemico riescono a ferirli, la novità della sensazione risulta quasi rinvigorente.
fluff.ja: エンペラーズ・チルドレンのターミネイターは、極めて堅牢な装甲服によって守られている。仮に敵の攻撃が装甲服を穿ち、実際に傷を負わせた時、その稀なる感覚は活力を与えることになる。
fluff.ko: 엠퍼러즈 칠드런 터미네이터를 휘감은 갑주는 얼마나 단단한지 적이 이들을 해하고자 일격을 내질러본들, 터미네이터는 버젓이 그 통각으로 쾌감의 극치만을 맛본다.
fluff.zh: 帝皇之子终结者的装甲十分坚固，因此在敌人难得击穿装甲并造成伤害时，这种疼痛对他们而言就像是提神的甘露。

target.en: One friendly unengaged Emperor’s Children Terminator unit.
target.de: Eine befreundete Emperor’s-Children-Terminator-Einheit, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
target.es: 1 unidad Exterminador Hijos del Emperador amiga no trabada.
target.fr: Une unité de Terminators Emperor’s Children amie non engagée.
target.ja: 非接敵状態である味方エンペラーズ・チルドレン・ターミネイター・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 엠퍼러즈 칠드런 터미네이터 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一个不处于交战状态的己方帝皇之子终结者单位。

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
when.de: Am Ende der Nahkampfphase deines Gegners
when.es: Al final de la fase de combate del oponente.
when.fr: À la fin de la phase de Combat adverse.
when.it: Alla fine della fase di Combattimento dell’avversario.
when.ja: 敵軍側白兵フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您对手的近战阶段结束时。

effect.en: Place your unit in strategic reserves.
effect.de: Versetze deine Einheit in die strategische Reserve.
effect.es: Coloca tu unidad en la reserva estratégica.
effect.it: Colloca la tua unità nelle riserve strategiche.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを戦略的予備戦力に配置する。
effect.zh: 将您的单位放入战略预备队。

fluff.en: Addicted to the supreme danger of teleportation, these Terminators employ twisted warp sorcery to plunge into the immaterium time and again.
fluff.de: Diese Terminatoren sind süchtig nach der einzigartigen Gefahr der Teleportation und setzen verdorbene Warphexerei ein, um sich wieder und wieder in das Immaterium zu stürzen.
fluff.es: Adictos al peligro supremo del teletransporte, estos Exterminadores emplean retorcida hechicería disforme para sumergirse en el inmaterium una y otra vez.
fluff.fr: Accoutumés au danger suprême de la téléportation, ces Terminators ont recours à la sorcellerie pour plonger dans l’Immaterium encore et toujours.
fluff.it: Dipendenti dal brivido estremo del teletrasporto, questi Terminator impiegano empie stregonerie warp per tuffarsi in continuazione nell’Immaterium.
fluff.ja: このターミネイターたちはテレポートに伴う極度の危険に憑りつかれており、〈歪み〉の魔術を用いては幾度となく非物質空間へと飛び込んでいく。
fluff.ko: 터미네이터가 텔레포트에 수반되는 극도의 위험성에 중독된 나머지, 사악한 워프술을 부려 이마테리움에 반복적으로 뛰어든다.
fluff.zh: 这些终结者痴迷于传送移动所带来的极大危险，利用扭曲的亚空间巫术进行反复的传送跳跃。

target.en: That <k>Emperor’s Children Terminator</k> unit
target.ja: その<k>エンペラーズ・チルドレン・ターミネイター</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>帝皇之子终结者</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Emperor’s Children Terminator unit is selected to attack.
when.de: In deiner Fernkampfphase oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Emperor’s-Children-Terminator-Einheit zum Attackieren gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Exterminador Hijos del Emperador amiga se elige para atacar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Terminators Emperor’s Children amie est choisie pour attaquer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Terminator degli Emperor’s Children amica viene scelta per attaccare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、味方エンペラーズ・チルドレン・ターミネイター・ユニットが攻撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 아군 엠퍼러즈 칠드런 터미네이터 유닛이 공격을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段或在近战阶段中，当一个己方帝皇之子终结者单位被选择进行攻击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s attacks have +2 S.
effect.es: Los ataques de tu unidad tienen +2 a F.
effect.fr: Les attaques de votre unité ont +2 en F.
effect.it: Gli attacchi della tua unità hanno +2 Fo.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの攻撃の【攻】は+2の修正を受ける。

fluff.en: The Terminators’ fervid need to annihilate ever more enemies manifests as a lurid empyric firestorm which wreathes their blows and the projectiles spat from their guns.
fluff.de: Der wahnhafte Trieb dieser Terminatoren, mehr und mehr Feinde auszulöschen, manifestiert sich in einem vielfarbigen empyreischen Feuersturm, der ihre Hiebe und die Projektile aus ihren Kanonen einhüllt.
fluff.es: La ferviente necesidad de los Exterminadores de aniquilar a cada vez más enemigos se manifiesta como una sensacional tormenta de fuego empírea que envuelve sus ataques.
fluff.fr: Le besoin fervent des Terminators d’annihiler toujours plus d’ennemis se manifeste sous forme d’une tempête de feu empyréen qui enveloppe leurs coups et les projectiles crachés par leurs armes.
fluff.it: L’impellente bisogno dei Terminator di annientare sempre più nemici si concretizza in una tempesta di fuoco empyrico variopinto che avvolge i loro attacchi e i proiettili sparati dalle loro armi.
fluff.ja: このターミネイターたちが、一体でも多くの敵を根絶しようとする苛烈な欲求は、彼ら一撃や銃口から打ち出される弾丸を包む、不気味な超常の炎という形で現出する。
fluff.ko: 적을 말살하고자 하는 터미네이터의 적의는 섬뜩한 워프 화염폭풍으로 발현된다. 그러다 마침내 터미네이터가 내지르는 일격과 총구를 떠난 탄환에 소용돌이치며 옮겨붙는다.
fluff.zh: 终结者们想要消灭敌人的迫切欲望会化作亚空间能量的火焰风暴，将他们的攻击和枪弹包裹起来。

name.ja: 恐怖の外貌（アップグレード）

description.en: Flawless Blades unit only. Enemy units cannot target this unit with snap shooting attacks.
description.de: Nur für eine Erlesene-Klingen-Einheit. Feindliche Einheiten können gegen diese Einheit keine Eiliger-Beschuss-Attacken ausführen.
description.es: Talento: Solo unidad Filos Impecables. Las unidades enemigas no pueden tomar esta unidad como blanco de ataques disparos repentinos.
description.fr: Amélioration : Unité de Lames Infaillibles seulement. Les unités ennemies ne peuvent pas cibler cette unité avec des attaques de tir au jugé
description.it: Miglioria: solo unità di Lame Impeccabili. Le unità nemiche non possono scegliere questa unità come bersaglio di attacchi tiro improvviso.
description.ja: アップグレード：フロウレス・ブレイド・ユニットのみ。敵ユニットは即応射撃で、このユニットを対象にすることはできない。

description.zh: 升级：仅限无瑕剑魔单位。敌方单位不能将该单位选择成为快速射击攻击的目标。

name.ja: 逸脱せし暴力（アップグレード）

description.en: <k>Emperor’s Children Terminator Squad</k> unit only. This unit’s attacks have <k>[Sustained Hits 1]</k>.
description.de: Nur für eine <k>Emperor’s</k>-<k>Children</k>-<k>Terminatortrupp</k>-Einheit. Attacken dieser Einheit haben <k>[Trefferhagel 1]</k>.
description.es: Solo unidad <k>Escuadra de Exterminadores Hijos del Emperador</k>. Los ataques de esta unidad tienen <k>[Golpes sostenidos 1]</k>.
description.fr: Unité d’<k>Escouade Terminator</k> des <k>Emperor’s Children</k> seulement. Les attaques de cette unité ont <k>[Touches Soutenues 1]</k>.
description.it: Solo unità <k>Squadra Terminator</k> degli <k>Emperor’s Children</k>. Gli attacchi di questa unità hanno <k>[Scarica di Colpi 1]</k>.
description.ja: <k>エンペラーズ・チルドレン・ターミネイター・スカッド</k>・ユニットのみ。このユニットの攻撃は<k>［連続命中1］</k>を持つ。
description.ko: <k>엠퍼러즈 칠드런 터미네이터 분대</k> 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 공격에 <k>[연타 1]</k>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限<k>帝皇之子终结者小队</k>单位。该单位的攻击拥有<k>[连击 1]</k>技能。

description.en: Lord Exultant model only. This model’s melee attacks have +1 S.
description.de: Nur für ein Fürst-des-Überschwangs-Modell. Nahkampfattacken dieses Modells haben +1 S.
description.es: Solo miniatura Lord Exultante. Los ataques de combate de esta miniatura tienen +1 a F.
description.fr: Figurine de Seigneur Exultant seulement. Les attaques de mêlée de cette figurine ont +1 en F.
description.it: Solo modelli di Lord Gaudente. Gli attacchi da mischia di questo modello hanno +1 Fo.
description.ja: ロード・エグザルタント・兵のみ。この兵の白兵攻撃の【攻】は+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 환희 군주 모델 전용. 이 모델의 백병전 공격에 위력 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限极乐领主模型。该模型近战攻击的 S 属性 +1。

description.en: Lord Exultant model only. This unit’s ranged attacks have +1 AP.
description.de: Nur für ein Fürst-des-Überschwangs-Modell. Die Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben +1 DS.
description.es: Solo miniatura Lord Exultante. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad tienen +1 a FP.
description.fr: Figurine de Seigneur Exultant seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont +1 en PA.
description.it: Solo modelli di Lord Gaudente. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità hanno +1 VP.
description.ja: ロード・エグザルタント・兵のみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃の【貫】は+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 환희 군주 모델 전용. 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 관통 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限极乐领主模型。该单位远程攻击的 AP 属性 +1。

description.es: Solo unidad Filos Impecables. Esta unidad tiene +2" a M.
description.fr: Unité de Lames Infaillibles seulement. Cette unité a +2" en M.

Lord Kakophonist model only.

  • This unit’s ranged attacks have [Ignores Cover].

Nur für ein Fürst-der-Kakofonie-Modell.

  • Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben [Deckung ignorieren].

Solo miniatura Señor Kakofonista.

Figurine de Seigneur Kakophoniste seulement.

ロード・カコフォニスト・兵のみ。

  • このユニットの射撃攻撃は［遮蔽無効］を持つ。
description.ko:
불협주의자 군주 모델 전용.
  • 이 모델에 심층 타격을 부여합니다.
  • 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [엄폐 무시]를 부여합니다.
description.zh:
仅限噪音领主模型。
  • 该模型拥有深入打击技能。
  • 该单位的远程攻击拥有[无视掩体]技能。

description.en: **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is also Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer’s unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to two **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through enemy models. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. You can target this unit with the **Heroic Intervention stratagem**, regardless of any other uses of that **stratagem** this phase. If you do:

▪ That use is -1 CP.

▪ That use does not prevent any uses of that **stratagem** on other units this phase.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights First ability.
**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** model only. Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of three or more enemy models, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer can fight one additional time. When doing so, you can select one ability using the Exquisite Swordsmanship Detachment rule to apply to those attacks.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** model only. Once per turn, in your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN TRANSPORT** that is in Strategic Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that **TRANSPORT** on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** model only. Each time the bearer disembarks from a **TRANSPORT,** until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit and enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** model only. Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, you can select one friendly **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit within 9" of the bearer that was hit by one or more of those attacks, then select one friendly **TRANSPORT** that unit is wholly within 6" of and is able to embark within. That **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** unit can embark within that **TRANSPORT.**

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** model only. Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN VEHICLE** model within 6" of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.
**EMPEROR'S CHILDREN** model only. When you target this unit with the **Heroic Intervention stratagem**, that use is -1 CP.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** model only. Once per battle, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. At the start of the battle, select one melee weapon equipped by the bearer; add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that weapon. In addition, each time the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, while resolving those attacks, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that weapon and that weapon has the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** and **[HAZARDOUS]** abilities.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** or **KEEPER OF SECRETS** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through enemy models. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, take a Leadership test for the bearer at the end of the phase. If that test is passed, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining (up to its Wounds characteristic).
**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test, subtracting 2 from the result if it is Battle-shocked: if failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. Once per turn, just after making a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw for a model in the bearer’s unit, if the bearer is not Battle-shocked, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, treat the result as an unmodified roll of 6 instead.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit. While the bearer’s unit is your army’s Favoured Champions, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if the bearer’s unit is your army’s Favoured Champions, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. You can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for the bearer’s unit. While the bearer’s unit is your army’s Favoured Champions, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the **[PRECISION]** ability, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a **CHARACTER** unit, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a melee attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Weapon Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and Wound roll.

**LORD EXULTANT** model only. Add 1" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.

In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a **FLAWLESS BLADES** unit.

**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN** model only. At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer; that unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.
**EMPEROR’S CHILDREN DAEMON PRINCE** model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.
Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 soulshatter lascannons; twin heavy bolter; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher.
This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 combi-bolter ◦ 1 combi-weapon

fluff.en: The Chaos Land Raiders used by the Emperor’s Children are massive armoured transports whose hulls are decorated with the vibrant iconography of Dark God and Legion. These tracked monstrosities purr and thrum with pleasure as they unleash booming volleys of destruction with their array of heavy weapons, stopping only to disgorge bands of warriors into the midst of the fighting.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 14 **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** models. Each **TERMINATOR** and **FLAWLESS BLADE** model takes up the space of 2 models.

description.en: Units can disembark from this **TRANSPORT** after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge that turn.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** combi-bolter; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher or can replace 1 combi-bolter with 1 havoc launcher.
This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 combi-bolter ◦ 1 combi-weapon

fluff.en: Eager and impetuous of spirit, Emperor’s Children Chaos Rhinos roar with barely contained anticipation as they thunder into the midst of battle to unload their cargo of warriors. Their garishly adorned hulls quiver with a perverse thrill in response to each impact upon their reinforced hulls as pintle‑mounted guns unleash spiteful volleys of destruction into the ranks of the enemy.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** models (excluding **TERMINATOR** and **FLAWLESS BLADE** models).

description.en: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6”.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** hideous mutations.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: For those amongst the Emperor’s Children who fall short of perfection, spawndom awaits. Chaos Spawn of Slaanesh hurl themselves into battle with reckless abandon, quivering with delight as they tear their opponents apart with mutant claws and sinuous tentacles.

description.en:
In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, you can use this ability. If you do, select one enemy unit hit by those ranged attacks. Until the end of the turn, when this unit **declares a charge**:

■ This unit can re-roll that **charge roll**.

■ This unit <u>must</u> end that **charge move engaged** with that enemy unit.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** combi-bolter; accursed weapon.

wargear.en: 1 model’s accursed weapon can be replaced with 1 chainfist.
Up to 3 models can each have their accursed weapon replaced with 1 power fist.
1 model’s combi-bolter and accursed weapon can be replaced with 1 paired accursed weapons.
Any number of models can each have their combi-bolter replaced with 1 combi-weapon.
1 Chaos Terminator’s combi-bolter can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 heavy flamer ◦ 1 reaper autocannon

fluff.en: Clad in baroque, embossed and gilt Terminator armour, these mighty champions are confident in their superiority, displaying masterful bladework and peerless marksmanship honed by millennia of pitiless slaughter. Their heavy weapons and devastating firepower can spell doom for enemy elite units and war machines alike.

description.en: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **SLAANESH INFANTRY** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

While a friendly **SLAANESH** unit is within 6" of this model, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. This model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** infernal cannon; hellforged weapons.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Possessed of an arrogance borne of infernal power and physical perfection, Daemon Princes of Slaanesh pride themselves upon their martial prowess. Skilled warriors armed with a variety of hellforged weapons, they seek to test themselves against the greatest champions, mortal or otherwise, leaving a tapestry of broken corpses and crimson gore in their wake.

Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

description.en: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each of this model’s remaining wounds: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).
Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

composition.en: **1 Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings**

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** infernal cannon; hellforged weapons.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Only the most debased, conceited and skilled warriors of the Emperor’s Children achieve daemonhood. Of these, a scant few are blessed with winged daemonic forms that enhance their already potent destructive power and open them to sensation beyond the ken of mortal minds. Thus do they eagerly seek battle, longing to inflict and experience the most exquisite of agonies.

description.en: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding **TITANIC** models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.
Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is not below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll
While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Monstrous bio-mechanical Daemon Engines, Defilers are possessed of an insuppressible thirst for souls and lust for lurid slaughter. They are relentless in their pursuit of gratification, obliterating targets in tempests of gunfire and wading into enemy formations to rip warriors to shreds with their clanking claws.

description.en: Each time this unit is selected to fight, it can call upon daemonic patrons. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, an unmodified Wound roll of 3+ scores a Critical Wound. At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit called upon daemonic patrons this phase and no enemy models were destroyed by attacks made by models in this unit this phase, one model in this unit is destroyed.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; blissblade.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: These cruel and arrogant warriors are consumed by pride in their own skill at arms. Granted power by daemonic patrons, the Flawless Blades strive to entertain their malefic masters with superlative swordplay and by inflicting vile and visceral death upon their foes.

description.en: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this model has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is poisoned. At the start of each player’s Command phase, roll one D6 for each poisoned enemy unit on the battlefield: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

At the start of your opponent’s Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Daemon Primarch of Slaanesh section (see below). Until the start of your opponent’s next Command phase, this model has that ability.
Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height.
Each time a model makes an attack that targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
This model has the Fights First ability.

While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, it must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.
If this model is in your army, it must be your **WARLORD**.
While this model has 1‑6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Fulgrim embodies the depravity and corruption of his once‑noble Legion. His sinuous serpentine form towers over the battlefield and moves with quicksilver speed, lashing whip and thrashing tail scattering those beguiled by the grotesque magnificence of his daemonic form. Any who possess the wherewithal to resist the Daemon Primarch’s stupefying aura are cut down with casual ease.

description.en: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move and roll two D6, adding 1 to each result if that enemy unit can **FLY**: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Hades autocannon; Heldrake claws.

wargear.en: This model’s Hades autocannon can be replaced with 1 baleflamer.

fluff.en: The dragon-like Daemon Engines known as Heldrakes soar above the battlefield, engaging in furious duels with enemy aircraft. They pick their foes apart with obsessive precision and malicious glee. Should the sky be cleared of victims, Heldrakes immediately direct their ire towards those on the ground, descending at breakneck speed to slaughter the enemy with weapon and claw.

description.en: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit destroyed one or more enemy units that phase, the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test. If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

**The Obsessionist is equipped with:** bolt pistol; power sword.
**Every Infractor is equipped with:** bolt pistol; duelling sabre.

fluff.en: Consumed by an obsessive desire to experience sensation in all its forms, Infractors hurl themselves upon the foe with ecstatic glee. Their veins thick with an esoteric cocktail of combat stimms, they are formidable and relentlessly cruel combatants.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.
If this model is attached to an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN BATTLELINE** unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" abilities.

This model’s plasma pistol can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 power fist ◦ 1 rapture lash

fluff.en: Lords Exultant embody the Emperor’s Children’s obsessive desire to experience new and terrible sensations. Their enhanced forms possess all manner of sensory enhancements, allowing them to experience the thrill of battle on a level that would drive lesser mortals to insanity. With lash and pistol, they lead from the front, slaughtering their foes in exquisitely lurid fashion.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **INFRACTORS** ■ **TORMENTORS**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy **INFANTRY** unit hit by one or more of those attacks and roll three D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If an enemy unit suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of this ability, it must take a Battle-shock test.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** screamer pistol; power sword.

wargear.en: This model’s power sword can be replaced with 1 screamer pistol and 1 close combat weapon.

fluff.en: The Lords Kakophonist derive pleasure from auditory stimuli. Such is their singular obsession with emitting lethal sonic destruction that their entire bodies have been agonisingly sculpted to further their art. Leading bands of Noise Marines, these infernal conductors lead an orchestra of discordant and deafening slaughter.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **CHAOS TERMINATORS** ■ **NOISE MARINES**

description.en: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **CHARACTER, MONSTER** or **WALKER** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
At the start of the Fight phase, if this model is not leading a unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Fights First ability.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: An arrogant slaughterer and swordmaster supreme, Lucius seeks out the most skilled of the foe’s champions, casually striking down lesser enemies that dare bar his path. Against worthy opponents, Lucius strikes with the speed of a snake, his daemonically sentient lash and blade making a mockery of the greatest warriors.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **FLAWLESS BLADES**

description.en: Each time this model makes an attack, if it is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If this model is also Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

wargear.en: This model’s lasher tendrils can be replaced with 2 magma cutters.

fluff.en: The Maulerfiends of the Emperor’s Children possess a ravenous appetite for carnage and are empowered by the agonies inflicted upon them. They charge recklessly into the thick of the fighting, howling with pleasure as they tear infantry apart and reduce fortifications and vehicles to molten rubble with their fists or glowing magma cutters.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

wargear.en: Up to 2 Noise Marines can each replace their sonic blaster with 1 blastmaster.
The Disharmonist’s sonic blaster can be replaced with 1 screamer pistol and 1 power sword.

fluff.en: Orchestrating riotous destruction on large scales, Noise Marines saturate the war zone with piercing bursts of shattering noise, thrumming waves of aural destruction and other extreme psychosonic attacks. These hedonistic worshippers of Slaanesh are inured to most stimuli and seek to unleash the most cacophonous destruction to stir their jaded senses.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in it have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one **INFANTRY** unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Agonising Energies. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is wracked with agonies. While a unit is wracked with agonies, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Agonising Energies; bolt pistol; force weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The Sorcerers of the Emperor’s Children delight in nothing more than toying with their foes. They utilise their fell magicks to inflict nightmarish agonies upon the minds and bodies of the living and to mask the advance of their underlings with illusory misdirection. They delight in each gruesome kill they make, for each is an offering to Slaanesh and promises a reward of power.

description.en: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit destroyed one or more enemy units that phase, the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test. If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

**The Obsessionist is equipped with:** bolt pistol; power sword.
**Every Tormentor is equipped with:** boltgun; close combat weapon.

The Obsessionist’s bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.

fluff.en: Clad in garish power armour and clutching over‑ornamented boltguns, Tormentors form the core of many Emperor’s Children warbands. Consumed by ego and desire, Tormentors are aggressive front‑line troops who prioritise aggression and speed, always seeking new and greater experiences and revelling in the gory deaths they inflict upon their enemies.
